name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the peanut butter and powdered sugar in a bowl.
2. Add the cream cheese, milk, and vanilla extract to the mixture.
3. Stir until well blended.
4. Gently fold in the cool whip.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared crumb crust.
6. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours before serving.
